caveats.notes: Migrated from M-30 honest-residual list. Closed by running canonical-22 with COMPGEN_RUN_KERNELS=1 on a host with cuda hardware AND host_cpu, so the same region_signature observes >=2 distinct target_class values.
caveats.required_to_close: run same region_signature on >=2 target_class values (need cuda hardware on the audit host)

caveats.notes: CI cannot spawn a Claude Code session against the task pack; doing so would defeat the no-private-context goal of the audit. The greedy baseline is the contractual reproducibility floor; the fresh-Claude run is recorded as an operator evidence row with a quarterly cadence.
caveats.required_to_close: operator runs a fresh Claude Code session against the task pack and records the outcome via compgen.audit.fresh_agent_modes.record_manual_session_result every quarter

caveats.notes: M-31 shipped the real pass-card registry; M-33 ships the verification-certificate gate and the producer-side invalidation discipline. All three previously-placeholder negative controls are now real fault injection: MissingPassCard (M-31; build a registry with a card missing and ask the validator to resolve both ids), PreconditionViolation (M-33; declare a card with a required verification rung, emit no certificate, assert VerificationGateMissing fires — note the test parametrize records the actual class raised), StaleAnalysisAudit (M-33; pass mutates graph_dossier_v3 but only claims semantic_obligations as invalidated, transitive closure check raises UnannouncedInvalidation which subclasses StaleAnalysisAudit).
caveats.required_to_close: Resolved by M-33. A future M-34 will add per-pass IR-level precondition checking (currently the closest typed error is VerificationGateMissing) and consumer-side stale-read detection (currently producer-side only).
